assumptions.title: Narrative Types in Separate File
assumptions.default: Create types/narrative.ts as standalone leaf file

assumptions.title: Scene Graphs Are Stateless Parameters
assumptions.default: Scene data passed as parameter, not stored on GameState

assumptions.title: Choice Flag Map Is Record<string, boolean>
Scene Engine and Dialogue Engine Independent
assumptions.default: No shared utilities between scene and dialogue engines

assumptions.title: Silent Error Handling for Missing Narrative State
assumptions.default: Return input state unchanged when narrativeState is null

decisions.title: Scene Prerequisite Model
decisions.context: Scenes need prerequisites (trait checks, flag checks, visited-scene checks). Options: flat array implicit AND, flat with operator field (all/any), or compound AND/OR nesting.
options: B: Flat list with operator field

decisions.title: SceneChoice Effect Reuse
decisions.context: Choice engine needs to apply personality adjustments and NPC state changes. Can reuse existing stateUpdaters (applyPersonalityAdjustment, updateNPCRelationship) or create new ones.
options: C: Shared effect types with generic applier

decisions.title: Scene JSON Location
decisions.context: Scene JSON data files need a home. Existing pattern: encounter.json in src/fixtures/, NPC templates in src/state/npcs.ts.

decisions.title: NarrativeState Result Type
decisions.context: State machine transitions need a return type. Plan requires typed errors for invalid transitions. Options: discriminated union, bundled result like DialogueResult, or state-only return.

decisions.title: initCombatState Synergy Integration
decisions.context: initCombatState has an unused _gameState parameter (placeholder). Synergy calculator needs player + NPC personality data. Options: read from GameState internally, pass synergy as extra param, or post-process externally.

decisions.title: Narrative Error Codes Location
decisions.context: Narrative needs error codes (SCENE_NOT_FOUND, CHOICE_NOT_AVAILABLE, NARRATIVE_NOT_STARTED). Options: extend existing ErrorCodes in types/index.ts or create separate NarrativeErrorCodes in types/narrative.ts.
